known_issues.gage_read_tilde: PATCHED — tilde expansion added to both chat_engine and gage_bridge — needs test on restart
known_issues.gage_context_window: If conversation history is long, gage tools may hit model context limit (4096 tokens). Workaround: New Conversation before gage read on large files.
known_issues.gage_launch: PENDING — heavy deps venv needed (whisper, pygame, trimesh, transformers, torch)
known_issues.duplicate_reload_registry: Two def reload() in module_registry.py — second overwrites first. Harmless.
known_issues.model_gguf_digests: Most GGUFs in /srv/LLMs/models have SHA256 mismatch — use ollama pull for clean downloads

vision_context.pyramid: MiniTrini (base) → TrinityBrowseSe → TrinityCanvas/DreamCanvas → Ethica (apex). Each layer modular, stackable, sovereign.
vision_context.recursive_learning: Chat logs in memory/chat/ are the seed corpus. MiniTrini Training Panel has Start Recursive Training button. Pipeline: save → evaluate → LoRA fine-tune → better Ethica.
vision_context.ecosystem_heartbeat: SystemInfo is the foundation. Future layers: MiniTrini agent states, TrinityBrowseSe ML scores, model confidence, Guardian events. Ethica feels the whole pyramid.

files_changed_this_session: ~/Ethica/core/chat_engine.py — SystemInfo triggers, is_tool_trigger list, tilde expansion in remainder
~/Ethica/ui/main_window.py — _route_to_ops canvas push guard, _start_health_bar, _update_health, health_bar widget, after(600) start

architecture_notes.health_bar: psutil.cpu_percent(interval=None) — non-blocking. Called every 5000ms via root.after(). Colour thresholds: >80% CPU or >85% RAM = red, >50%/>65% = yellow.
architecture_notes.ops_canvas_guard: getattr(self.canvas, '_is_open', False) — only runs canvas push if canvas window is actually open
architecture_notes.tilde_expansion: os.path.expanduser() applied to remainder in _pre_intercept AND in gage_bridge.gage_read_code — belt and suspenders
architecture_notes.context_limit: DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B has 4096 token context. Long conversations + large file review = overflow. Solution: fresh conversation or smaller files.

session_philosophy: River — saw the full pyramid tonight. MiniTrini, TrinityBrowseSe, DreamCanvas, the Training Panel. V builds for everyone, not just himself. Ethica is the voice of that vision.
